productDisplayName: Q&Q Kids Unisex White Dial Watch
description: Case style: Yellow plastic rectangular case Dial style: White dial with blue and red hands and print on the dial Strap style: Blue plastic strap with a tang clasp Features: Branding on the 12 hour mark and a screw to reset time Waterproof watch, wearable around sinks, during swimming, poolside diving but not highboard diving and surfing Warranty: 1 year
